data.body: Verify whether Loom already supports the output semantics Knots needs per action and per profile. If it does not, extend Loom and the bundle/runtime mapping so a workflow can declare the expected artifact/review target for each step, such as branch, PR, merged main commit, or live deployment. Prompt rendering must receive the resolved output metadata at runtime rather than relying on a single flattened profile-wide output mode.
data.title: Model workflow outputs explicitly in Loom
